title: d2c IR Decision Lock
description: Freezes component choices and token mappings from Phase 2 IR so retries converge instead of re-rolling decisions. Written immediately after validate-ir.js exits 0. On retry, entries with status 'locked' are immutable; only 'failed' entries may be re-decided.

schema_version.description: IR artifact schema version. Must match component-match.json schema_version.

locked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (with timezone) of when the lock was created.

layout_locked.description: If true, layout.json is frozen as a whole. Changing any layout decision requires full IR regeneration. Always true in v1.

nodes.description: Map of Figma node ID (e.g. '1:234') to lock entry. Keys must match component-match.json.nodes keys.

componentId.description: The locked component choice. Must match component-match.json.nodes[nodeId].chosen for locked nodes. Null only when chosen was null (ambiguous, should not happen after validation). The literal '__NEW__' is stored as-is when creating a new component.

status.description: 'locked' = immutable, do not re-decide. 'failed' = may be re-decided on retry.

locked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this node was locked (or re-locked after re-decision).

failure_reason.description: Present only when status is 'failed'. Human-readable explanation of why this node needs re-decision.

failed_at.description: Present only when status is 'failed'. ISO 8601 timestamp when failure was marked.

failed_by.description: Present only when status is 'failed'. Which mechanism marked the failure.
